cards.definition: 'out of' or 'away from,' indicating movement outward or removal
'into' or 'not,' indicating either inward movement or negation
'with' or 'together,' indicating union, completeness, or joint action
'across' or 'beyond,' indicating movement from one side or state to another
'under' or 'below,' indicating lower position, secondary rank, or concealment
'above' or 'beyond,' indicating higher position, excess, or superiority
'between' or 'among,' indicating position in the middle or mutual action
'before,' indicating priority in time, position, or rank
'after' or 'behind,' indicating later occurrence in time or secondary position
'forward' or 'in favor of,' indicating forward motion, advocacy, or substitution
'back' or 'again,' indicating return, repetition, or restoration to a former state
'down,' 'away from,' or 'completely,' indicating removal, descent, or reversal
'apart,' 'away,' or 'not,' indicating separation, negation, or reversal
'against' or 'in the way of,' indicating resistance, confrontation, or blockage
'through' or 'thoroughly,' indicating passage, completion, or doing something to the fullest extent
'around,' indicating movement or position encircling something
'against' or 'opposite,' indicating opposition, contrast, or counteraction
'away from' or 'off,' indicating separation, departure, or removal
'toward' or 'to,' indicating approach, addition, or nearness
'apart' or 'aside,' indicating withdrawal, division, or setting something away
